name: mafs
when_to_use: For any scene involving mathematical content: equations, function plots, coordinate systems, vectors, geometric shapes, calculus visualization, or LaTeX rendering
import_instructions: import { Mafs, Coordinates, Plot, Line, Circle, Point, Vector, Text as MafsText, Polygon, useMovablePoint, Theme, vec, LaTeX } from 'mafs'; import 'mafs/core.css'; import 'mafs/font.css';
api_reference:
MAFS — MATH VISUALIZATION LIBRARY

React components for interactive math visualization. PREFER mafs for ALL math-related content.

CONTAINER:
<Mafs width={1920} height={1080} viewBox={{ x: [-5, 5], y: [-3, 3] }} pan={false} zoom={false}>
  <Coordinates.Cartesian />
  {/* math content */}
</Mafs>
ALWAYS set width and height explicitly (use 1920x1080 for full-frame).

COMPONENTS:
- <Coordinates.Cartesian /> or <Coordinates.Polar /> — axis grid
- <Plot.OfX y={(x) => Math.sin(x)} color={Theme.blue} /> — plot y=f(x)
- <Plot.Parametric xy={(t) => [Math.cos(t), Math.sin(t)]} t={[0, 2*Math.PI]} />
- <Plot.Inequality y={{ '<': (x) => Math.sin(x), '>': (x) => -1 }} />
- <Point x={2} y={3} color={Theme.orange} /> — point marker (NO opacity prop)
- <Vector tail={[0,0]} tip={[3,2]} color={Theme.green} /> — arrow vector
- <Circle center={[0,0]} radius={2} color={Theme.blue} />
- <Line.ThroughPoints point1={[0,0]} point2={[3,2]} /> — line through 2 points
- <Line.PointSlope point={[0,0]} slope={2} />
- <Line.PointAngle point={[0,0]} angle={Math.PI/4} />
- <Line.Segment point1={[0,0]} point2={[3,2]} />
- <Polygon points={[[0,0],[3,0],[1.5,2]]} color={Theme.indigo} />
- <LaTeX tex="E=mc^2" at={[2, 3]} /> — LaTeX at position
- <MafsText x={2} y={3}>Label</MafsText>

LINE SUB-COMPONENTS — ONLY these exist:
  Line.ThroughPoints, Line.PointSlope, Line.PointAngle, Line.Segment
  There is NO Line.Horizontal or Line.Vertical!
  For horizontal: <Line.ThroughPoints point1={[-10, y]} point2={[10, y]} />
  For vertical: <Line.ThroughPoints point1={[x, -10]} point2={[x, 10]} />

THEME COLORS: Theme.blue, Theme.orange, Theme.green, Theme.red, Theme.indigo, Theme.pink, Theme.yellow

ANIMATION: Use useCurrentFrame() + interpolate() to animate viewBox, point positions, function parameters, colors, and opacity of container divs.
forbidden_patterns: Do NOT use Line.Horizontal or Line.Vertical — they do not exist. Use Line.ThroughPoints instead
Do NOT pass opacity prop to <Point> — it does not accept it. Wrap in a div with opacity instead
Do NOT forget to import CSS: 'mafs/core.css' and 'mafs/font.css'
Do NOT use <Text> from mafs — it is exported as MafsText to avoid conflicts with Remotion's Text
remotion_integration_notes: Mafs renders via SVG in React. Wrap <Mafs> in a positioned div. Animate by changing props based on useCurrentFrame(). For reveal effects, use clip-path or opacity on wrapper divs. The viewBox can be animated for zoom effects.
